metadata.comments: Solution template for Alibaba Cloud Networking

[concat('Region to deploy solution resources -- separate from location selection',parameters('location'))]
Workspace name for Log Analytics where Microsoft Sentinel is setup
resource group name where Microsoft Sentinel is setup
subscription id where Microsoft Sentinel is setup

properties.displayName: Alibaba Cloud Networking Data Connector (via Codeless Connector Framework)

connectorUiConfig.title: Alibaba Cloud Networking Data Connector (via Codeless Connector Framework)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The Alibaba Cloud Networking data connector provides the capability to ingest [Alibaba Cloud](https://www.alibabacloud.com/) networking data into Microsoft Sentinel through the Simple Log Service (SLS) REST API. Refer to [API documentation](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/sls/developer-reference/api-sls-2020-12-30-endpoint) for more information. The connector provides the ability to get VPC Flow Logs, WAF Logs, and API Gateway Logs from Alibaba Cloud.

sampleQueries.description: All Alibaba Cloud VPC Flow Logs
Get sample of Alibaba Cloud VPC Flow Logs

dataTypes.name: AlibabaCloudVPCFlowLogs
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
AlibabaCloudVPCFlowLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(12h)
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: AlibabaCloudWAFLogs
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
AlibabaCloudWAFLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(12h)
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: AlibabaCloudAPIGatewayLogs
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
AlibabaCloudAPIGatewayLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(12h)
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: Alibaba Cloud SLS API access
customs.description: **Alibaba Cloud Simple Log Service** access is required for the SLS API.

instructionSteps.title: Configure access to AliCloud SLS API
instructionSteps.description:
Before using the API, you need to prepare your identity account and access key pair to effectively access the API.
1. We recommend that you use a Resource Access Management (RAM) user to call API operations. For more information, see [create a RAM user and authorize the RAM user to access Simple Log Service](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/sls/create-a-ram-user-and-authorize-the-ram-user-to-access-log-service).
2. Obtain the access key pair for the RAM user. For details see [get Access Key pair](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ram/user-guide/create-an-accesskey-pair).

Note the access key pair details for the next step.

parameters.label: Log Region
parameters.placeholder: Enter Log Region where the Log Store is located, e.g. cn-shenzhen
parameters.name: logRegion

properties.displayName: Alibaba Cloud Networking Data Connector (via Codeless Connector Framework)

connectorDefinitionName.defaultValue: Alibaba Cloud Networking Data Connector (via Codeless Connector Framework)

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

The Microsoft Sentinel solution for Alibaba Cloud Networking enables seamless integration of Alibaba Cloud network data into Sentinel. It empowers security teams to monitor network activity, detect threats, and investigate incidents across Alibaba Cloud environments—enhancing visibility and security posture in multi-cloud deployments.

Data Connectors: 1, Parsers: 3

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions

properties.description: parser_AlibabaCloudWAFLogsAliasFunction Data Parser with template version 3.0.0
